## Testing

- [ ] Ran relevant automated tests
- [ ] Performed manual smoke check where needed
- [ ] Not tested, reason:

## Risk Checklist

- [ ] Camera movement / VISCA commands
- [ ] ATEM integration or automation
- [ ] Runtime config, customer data, backups, or migration
- [ ] Login, password, audit, logs, or security-sensitive paths
- [ ] Raspberry Pi deployment, systemd, install, update, or rollback
- [ ] Documentation-only change

## Safety Notes

- [ ] No passwords, tokens, secrets, real customer IPs, or local-only files are included
- [ ] Customer/runtime data is not committed
- [ ] Rollback or recovery steps are documented when deployment behaviour changes
